matches.title: [SLIDES] Thematic Event: Scaling Digital Health Solutions: Connecting TEFs, EDIHs and DIGITAL for Health Innovation
matches.abstract:
This is the slide deck of the Event "Scaling Digital Health Solutions: Connecting TEFs, EDIHs and DIGITAL for Health Innovation". The event was organised by DEDEP.eu, CoordinaTEF and DTA Phase II supporting the network of EDIHs and was held on 7 July 2026.

matches.title: AI-DRIVEN TRANSFORMATION OF THE DIGITAL ECONOMY: INNOVATION, COMPETITION, AND STRATEGIC OPPORTUNITIES IN EMERGING MARKETS
matches.abstract: AI is rapidly reshaping the global economy, offering transformative opportunities across sectors. This article examines how AI-driven innovation influences competitive advantage and economic growth, with focus on Uzbekistan's Digital Economy Vision 2030. A systematic review of peer-reviewed literature (2022–2025) maps adoption frameworks and compares AI integration across enterprise sizes. Results
